text:
Created attachment 183221
Update to 1.8.3

Update mail/mutt to 1.8.3
    
- Update to 1.8.3
- Move post-patch to pre-configure so it doesn't interfere with patch debuggging
- Move date_conditional patch to a slightly more up-to-date version
- Move IFDEF_PATCH to an EXTRA_PATCH
- Clean up default options patches to be as offset/fuzz free as possible
